---
format:
  html:
    theme: none
    minimal: true
---

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 9
#| fig-height: 9
library(tidyverse)

games <- read_csv("Games.csv") %>%
  filter(homeScore > 0, awayScore > 0)

games_counts <- games %>%
  count(homeScore, awayScore)

ggplot(games_counts, aes(x = homeScore, y = awayScore, color = n)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 1.2) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "plasma", trans = "log10", name = "Frequency (log scale)") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  labs(
    title = "NBA Home vs. Away Scores",
    subtitle = "Home team advantage shifts the mass of games slightly below the 45-degree line\n(where Home Score > Away Score)",
    caption = "Data Source: Games.csv",
    x = "Home Team Score",
    y = "Away Team Score"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18, margin = margin(b = 6)),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray30", size = 12, margin = margin(b = 12), lineheight = 1.2),
    plot.caption = element_text(color = "gray50", size = 10, margin = margin(t = 12)),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10)
  ) +
  coord_fixed()
```
